name: Potato Cheddar Soup
recipeIngredient: 4 large Yukon Gold potatoes, peeled and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 6-quart pot, melt the butter over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onions and black pepper. Sauté until the onions are tender, about 5-7 minutes.
3. Add the sliced potatoes, chicken stock, and bay leaves to the pot. Stir gently.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 45 minutes to 1 hour, or until the potatoes are very tender.
5. Remove the bay leaves from the soup.
6. Gradually stir in the cubed Cheddar cheese until it is fully melted and incorporated into the soup.
7. Carefully transfer the soup into a food blender and process until smooth.
8. Return the blended soup to the stock pot.
9. Serve hot, garnished with ground nutmeg and shredded sharp Cheddar cheese on top of each serving.
